description: Build a predictive model for Ames Housing prices using Regularized Regression (Ridge, LASSO, and Elastic Net) using the AmesHousing dataset. Write an R script to /home/ga/RProjects/ames_elasticnet.R that predicts the log-transformed Sale_Price. The script should perform 10-fold cross-validation for all three models. Generate the following outputs in /home/ga/RProjects/output/: ames_preprocessing_summary.csv (summarizing data cleaning for at least 20 variables), ames_model_comparison.csv (comparing lambda_min, lambda_1se, and CV RMSE converted back to dollars for all models), ames_top_predictors.csv (listing the top 15 predictors from the best model by absolute coefficient magnitude), and ames_elasticnet_diagnostics.png (showing cross-validation curves, coefficient paths, and predicted vs. actual values).
